author: Nintendo Everything
text:
June 2026 Nintendo Direct pre-orders roundup

A slew of games were announced for Switch 2 and Switch today during the new Nintendo Direct, and while retailers going live with new pre-orders, we’ve gone ahead and rounded everything up. This post will be updated over the next couple of days as new products go live. We’ll also have everything in our weekly pre-order post on Sunday which...

The post June 2026 Nintendo Direct pre-orders roundup appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Video: Kingdom Hearts 3 Nintendo Switch 2 vs. PS5 vs. Steam Deck graphics comparison

Kingdom Hearts 3 got a demo on Nintendo Switch 2 after yesterday’s Nintendo Direct, and thanks to that, we’re able to see how this version holds up compared to the PlayStation 5 (via PS4 Pro backwards compatibility) and Steam Deck. The Kingdom Hearts franchise will finally be appearing on Nintendo Switch 2 in the way fans have wanted. While prior...

The post Video: Kingdom Hearts 3 Nintendo Switch 2 vs. PS5 vs. Steam Deck graphics comparison appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Final Fantasy 14 receives first Nintendo Switch 2 gameplay trailer

We now have a good look at Final Fantasy 14 on Nintendo Switch 2 with a proper gameplay trailer. Square Enix announced a port of the game at the end of April during the Fan Festival. However, we didn’t really get a look at the Nintendo Switch 2 version at all. A few seconds of footage did appear during yesterday’...

The post Final Fantasy 14 receives first Nintendo Switch 2 gameplay trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Hades 2 hotfix 4 update announced, patch notes

Yet another update has been announced for Hades 2 with hotfix 4. Like previous patches, it will be available soon on Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch. Supergiant Games is addressing another round of fixes here. No new content is included, which was expected. You can find the full rundown below, but note that some players may consider a couple of...

The post Hades 2 hotfix 4 update announced, patch notes appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
The Slormancer announced for Nintendo Switch

Publisher Plug In Digital and Abiding Bridge, alongside developer Slormite Studios, have announced that The Slormancer is coming to Nintendo Switch. It was also confirmed that a physical version of the game will be released in partnership with Maximum Entertainment. The game is an epic 2D action RPG dungeon-crawling adventure that follows a band of outcasts as they battle massive...

The post The Slormancer announced for Nintendo Switch appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Capcom details the reason for Resident Evil Veronica’s new name, will be third-person

After years of speculation, Capcom has finally unveiled the remake of one of its most beloved cult classics. Resident Evil: Veronica has officially been announced, with a release planned for Nintendo Switch 2 in 2027. One detail that immediately caught fans’ attention wasn’t just the game’s dramatic visual overhaul, but also its title. The remake drops the “Code” portion of...

The post Capcom details the reason for Resident Evil Veronica’s new name, will be third-person appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Final Fantasy 7 Revelation could get DLC

Although nothing is set in stone at this time, Square Enix is open to DLC for Final Fantasy 7 Revelation. Final Fantasy 7 Remake saw DLC with Episode Intermission, which featured Yuffie Kisaragi. However, for Final Fantasy 7 Rebirth, Square Enix skipped extra content entirely. Now with Final Fantasy 7 Revelation closing out the trilogy, Square Enix could go back...

The post Final Fantasy 7 Revelation could get DLC appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Super Scram Kitty announced for Nintendo Switch, reimagining of the Wii U game

More than a decade after the launch of Scram Kitty and his Buddy on Rails, the game is returning as Super Scram Kitty. It will be available on June 18, 2026. Scram Kitty and his Buddy on Rails came to Wii U in 2014. It was one of the more noteworthy indies on the platform as a game that featured...

The post Super Scram Kitty announced for Nintendo Switch, reimagining of the Wii U game appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Crazy Taxi: World Tour producer explains how the team is using AI

After years of silence, the Crazy Taxi franchise is finally making a comeback. During the Xbox Showcase, SEGA officially revealed Crazy Taxi: World Tour, a brand-new entry in the iconic arcade racing series that is also confirmed for Nintendo Switch 2 in 2027. However, the announcement wasn’t met with universal excitement. Shortly after the reveal, it emerged that the game...

The post Crazy Taxi: World Tour producer explains how the team is using AI appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
PowerWash Simulator 2 1.3 update announced

A brand new update has been announced for PowerWash Simulator with version 1.3. It will be out for Nintendo Switch 2 on July 16, 2026. The update is led by the free Caldera Chronicles job at a bowling alley. Also included are message archives and bug fixes. Here’s the full rundown: Let’s get the ball rolling and take a little...

The post PowerWash Simulator 2 1.3 update announced appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
